main:
Updated on 16th July, 2026  
  
We are a not-for-profit, volunteer-run organization dedicated to providing spiritual guidance and wisdom to seekers around the world. This Privacy Policy applies to our public website (including https://sadhansangha.in and related mirrors) and to our official mobile applications for iOS and Android (Sadhan Sangha Ashram). We value your privacy and are committed to clear, accurate disclosure of how information is handled across these services.  
  
**What We Do Not Ask For**  
  
We do not require you to create an account, sign in, or register. We do not ask users to submit personal profile information through the website or the mobile apps. We do not operate in-app purchases, payment gateways, or donation checkout forms inside the apps. We do not request access to your contacts, camera, microphone, photos library, precise location, or similar sensitive device permissions for core app features.  
  
**Data Collection - Website and Mobile Apps**  
  
We do not collect personal data that you type into forms on our website or in our mobile apps for the purpose of building user profiles, mailing lists, or marketing databases. There is no login system and no user-generated account storage on our servers.  
  
Public content (text, configuration, images, and media links) is hosted as static files and may be downloaded by your browser or app so pages and screens can display. That content is organizational/public information, not information you provide about yourself.  
  
**Website - Local Storage, Language, and Analytics**  
  
Our website may store small amounts of data in your browser (for example local storage) so that recently fetched configuration and text packs, and your selected language preference (English, Bengali, or Hindi), can load faster on return visits. This stays on your device unless you clear site data in your browser.  
  
The website uses Google Analytics (Google tag / gtag) to understand aggregate traffic and basic usage of the site. Google may set cookies or use similar technologies and process technical data such as IP address, device/browser information, and page views under Google's own terms and privacy policy. We use this only for operating and improving the website. You can limit analytics cookies through your browser settings or Google's available controls where applicable.  
  
**Mobile Apps - On-Device Cache and Network Content**  
  
The Sadhan Sangha Ashram mobile apps fetch public configuration and text from our static content CDN and a public version indicator so screens stay up to date without requiring an app-store release for every content change. The apps may also load public images and media thumbnails over the network as you browse.  
  
To improve performance and support limited offline use, the apps may cache configuration and text JSON in on-device app storage. This cache contains our public content, not a personal profile. You can remove it by clearing the app's storage or uninstalling the app.  
  
The mobile apps do not include advertising SDKs, and they do not include analytics or tracking SDKs equivalent to the website's Google Analytics tag. We do not sell personal information.  
  
**External Links and Third-Party Services**  
  
Website pages and mobile app screens may open or link to third-party services such as YouTube, Spotify, Amazon Music, Google Maps, email (mailto), or phone dialer (tel). When you leave our site or app for those services, their privacy policies and terms apply. We do not control how those third parties process data once you interact with them.  
  
**Donations**  
  
Our website may provide a Donation page that displays bank-transfer details (for example account name, account number, IFSC, SWIFT, and branch) so devotees can support the Ashram voluntarily through their own bank. We do not process card payments, UPI SDKs, or in-app checkout inside the mobile apps. If you choose to donate, your bank or payment provider - not our website or apps - handles the transfer under their policies. Copying displayed bank details on the website (for example via a copy button) happens on your device and does not send those details to us as a form submission.  
  
**Languages**  
  
The website supports multiple languages (currently English, Bengali, and Hindi). Language selection may be remembered locally in your browser. Translated text packs are loaded as public static content. Choosing a language does not create an account or transmit personal identity information to us beyond normal website/network requests described in this policy.  
  
**Image Usage**  
  
Images provided through our website and apps are free for personal use. If you wish to use any images for other purposes, please contact us for permission. We are committed to respecting the intellectual property rights of our contributors.  
  
**Children**  
  
Our services provide spiritual and informational content and are not directed at collecting personal information from children. We do not knowingly solicit personal data from children through accounts or forms on our website or apps.  
  
**Operation of Our Services**  
  
Our website and related digital services are run and maintained by devoted volunteers of Sadhan Sangha Ashram. The Ashram operates on the generous donations and charity of its devotees. All content, including images and text, supports our mission of spreading spiritual knowledge and tranquility.  
  
**Changes to This Policy**  
  
We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time to reflect changes in our practices or for operational, legal, or regulatory reasons. The "Updated on" date at the top will change when we do. We encourage you to review this page periodically. Continued use of the website or mobile apps after an update means you should read the revised policy.  
  
**Contact Us**  
  
If you have questions or concerns about this Privacy Policy, our website, or our mobile applications, please contact us. Contact details (email, phone, and ashram location) are shown on this page and on our Contact / footer sections and may be updated in our public configuration without changing the substance of this policy.
conclusion: Thank you for visiting Sadhan Sangha Ashram online and for using our mobile apps when available. We appreciate your support and are grateful for your trust in our community.
